text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is here. With the Kikuka Sho on the
horizon, this summer will put us to the test.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The wheels of fortune go round and round! All
aboard, we're heading southward!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is finally here, Trainer. Let's make it
one to remember!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And do know that our fate is at stake here. If we
don't find ourselves in the illumination of great
hope, only darkness awaits. We either find
happiness or we die!
choice_data_list: That's a bit of an exaggeration...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
M-maybe. But now you know how determined I
really am.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now then, according to my lucky map... our
training camp is just up ahead.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Egads, the direction we're heading in now is very
auspicious! Northeast, the direction of the ox!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep on pushing! The farther we go, the
more good fortune will come our way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait! We've gone past the central point on my
map... That can only mean...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ack?! We're going in the least auspicious
direction possible! Bad luck is upon us! STOP THE
BUS!
choice_data_list: They're not going to stop the bus...
They're not going to stop the bus...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, I guess you're right... I just knew this
summer wasn't going to be that simple...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But that's why I have to fight back with everything
I've got. Come at me, endless sea of challenges!
You'll have to get through Trainer first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I think I'll let her fend for herself. This is bound
to be one fiery summer.
